---
title: Schedule of experiments
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{mermaid}
gantt
    title Fly pushing
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Selection
        vg virgin check :a1, 2025-05-28, 3d
		CS males :2025-05-28, 3d
        vg x CS mating and oviposition  :3d
		F1 growing :11d
		F1 x F1 mating and oviposition  :3d
		F2 growing :11d
		F2 collecting  :3d
		F2 x F2 oviposition :1d 
		F3 growing :11d
		F3 count :3d
    section vge
        e virgin check :2025-06-04, 3d
        vg males    :2025-06-04, 3d
		e x vg mating and oviposition :3d
		F1 growing :11d
		F1 x F1 mating and oviposition  :3d
		F2 growing :11d
		F2 count  :3d
	section Mating
		vg oviposition :2025-06-04, 3d
		vg growing :11d
		vg collecting virgins nad males :7d
		CS oviposition :2025-06-04, 3d
		CS growing :11d
		CS collecting virgins and males :7d
		Mating Preferences :3d
	section cnbw
		CS oviposition :cs1, 2025-06-04, 3d
		CS growing :11d
		CS collecting virgins :3d
		cnbw oviposition :cnbw1, 2025-06-04, 3d
		cnbw growing :cnbw2, after cnbw1, 11d
		cnbw females and males :cnbw3, after cnbw2, 3d
		CS x cnbw mating and oviposition :3d
		F1 growing :11d
		F1 virgins and males :3d
		cnbw mating and oviposition :after cnbw3, 3d
		cnbw growing :11d
		cnbw virgins and males :3d
		F1 x cnbw, cnbw x F1 mating and oviposition :3d
		F2 growing :11d
		F2 count :3d
```
